author: The Conversation
title: Here's The Science on How Peptides Could Boost Your Workout - ScienceAlert
description: Peptides are widely marketed as a kind of "holy grail" for workout recovery and physical performance.

author: Charles Gasparino
title: Kevin Warsh needs to be confirmed as Fed Chair in order to avoid an economic shutdown - New York Post
description: Kevin Warsh would like to start as Fed chairman yesterday, but his nomination as the head of the central bank remains in limbo.

author: Lawrence Abrams
title: Axios npm hack used fake Teams error fix to hijack maintainer account - BleepingComputer
description: The maintainers of the popular Axios HTTP client have published a detailed post-mortem describing how one of its developers was targeted by a social engineering campaign believed to have been conducted by North Korean threat actors.

author: Kevin Derby
title: United Airlines Cuts Perks in New Basic Polaris Business Fare - aviationa2z.com
description: United Airlines launches 3-tier fares in 2026, cutting bags, seats, and lounge access in basic Polaris business class.
